relevant_solutions.relevance: HIGH — The Cloudflare Worker calls the retention-tick Edge Function via HTTP fetch. The known pattern of Supabase Edge Runtime returning HTTP 200 with error in body on boot-crash applies directly. The Worker currently does not parse the body for success:false. This is the same failure mode documented in the solution.
relevant_solutions.action: Apply body-error guard in cloudflare-workers/retention-cron.js per the canonical guard pattern in the solution doc.

relevant_solutions.relevance: LOW — The new migration creates a non-synced table (no Dexie counterpart). The schema invariants (SECURITY DEFINER upserts, fieldMap, etc.) are not applicable here.
